description: Third Bridge provides expert-network consultations, interview transcripts, surveys, and research products for investors and business teams. Its offerings include a large library of company and industry insights plus AI-oriented access to that content.
summary: Third Bridge exposes a documented MCP server for AI agents at `https://ai.thirdbridge.com/mcp/sse`, authenticated with Third Bridge-issued OAuth; its site also mentions API-based data feeds, but no public developer docs or machine-readable API spec were found for them.
